tasks.title: Implement 'Add To' dropdown on Change Events selection bar
tasks.description: Add cascading 'Add To' dropdown to the selection toolbar that appears when rows are selected. Options: Prime Contract PCO (New), Commitment CO (New), Commitment (link). Opens appropriate creation form/dialog.

tasks.title: Add SOV/Line Items to Prime Contract CO detail page
tasks.description: Create SOV line items API + UI for prime contract change orders. Table with: Budget Code, Description, Amount, Cost Type. API: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE under /prime-contract-change-orders/{id}/line-items.

tasks.title: Add SOV/Line Items to Commitment CO detail page
tasks.description: Create SOV line items API + UI for commitment change orders. Table with: Budget Code, Description, Amount, Change Event Line Item. API: GET/POST under commitment CO routes.

tasks.title: Expand Prime CO create form with all Procore fields
tasks.description: Add missing fields: change_reason, description, designated_reviewer, request_received_from, due_date, invoiced_date, schedule_impact, revised_substantial_completion_date, location, reference, executed, field_change, is_private, paid_in_full. DB columns already exist.

tasks.title: Expand Commitment CO create form with all Procore fields
tasks.description: Add missing fields: designated_reviewer, request_received_from, schedule_impact, location, reference, is_private, executed, field_change, paid_in_full. DB columns already exist.

tasks.title: Add missing PCO database columns + form fields
tasks.description: Migration to add: change_reason, location, reference, request_received_from, due_date, is_private, field_change, paid_in_full. Then update PCO create/edit forms.

tasks.title: Add Clone action to Change Event detail page
tasks.description: Add 'Clone' option to the vertical ellipsis dropdown. Should duplicate the CE with new number and 'Open' status.

tasks.title: Enable export on Change Orders list page
tasks.description: Set enableExport: true and implement CSV export handler for both Prime and Commitment tabs.
